"[5] SIGALERT UPDATE IN LONG BEACH: SB I-405, NORTH OF LONG BEACH BLVD, THE HOV/1/2 LANES WILL BE CLOSED FOR APPROXIMATELY TWO HOURS. NB I-405, NORTH OF LONG BEACH BLVD, THE #4 LANE OF THE MAIN PORTION AND #1 LANE OF THE I-710 TRANSITION WILL BE CLOSED FOR APPROXIMATELY 45 MINUTES DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION - REF LOG 297"
